artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-05-19
artifacts.excerpt:
99.9% of non-technical people don't care about the technical details. 

They just want something to work the way they expect it.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2023-07-07
artifacts.excerpt:
@BearNotesApp I've been using the Beta and I can bear-ly contain my excitement to see it launch! 

I don't think it's Polar-izing to say this is the best version of the app ever. 

People will be claw-ing at their phone to download it ASAP. 

It will be Panda-monium!
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, need, want, think.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-05-11
artifacts.excerpt:
My wife and I have our fortnightly date night! It starts separately: she gets a massage while I have a cigar. 

It sounds weird but at home, with 3 small kids, we don't get much space for ourselves. So we take an hour each, then reconvene to chat over dinner and drinks.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, need, want, think.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2023-11-10
artifacts.excerpt:
Remember friends: mean/hurtful/low quality comments on social media aren't worth responding to. 

The person is looking for an outlet to make themselves feel better because they don't like themself. 

You won't change that with a response. Block and move on.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, need, want, think.
